parameters.query: WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO webhook_events (event_id) VALUES ($1) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO UPDATE SET processed_at = webhook_events.processed_at RETURNING (xmax = 0) AS inserted) SELECT (SELECT inserted FROM ins) AS inserted, $2::jsonb AS msg

SELECT ci.id AS identity_id, ci.status, u.role FROM (VALUES ($1, $2)) v(cuid, chan) LEFT JOIN chat_identities ci ON ci.channel = v.chan AND ci.channel_user_id = v.cuid LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ci.javis_user_id

WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO chat_identities (id, channel, channel_user_id, display_name, status, created_at) VALUES ('ci_' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 20), $3, $1, $2, 'pending', now()) ON CONFLICT (channel, channel_user_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins) AS new_identity_id, (SELECT ci.channel_user_id FROM chat_identities ci JOIN users u ON u.id = ci.javis_user_id WHERE u.role = 'ADMIN' AND ci.channel = 'line' LIMIT 1) AS admin_uid

WITH tgt AS (SELECT id, channel, channel_user_id, display_name FROM chat_identities WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending'), usr AS (INSERT INTO users (id, email, name, role, created_at) SELECT 'u_' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 20), channel || '-' || channel_user_id || '@chat.javis.local', display_name, $3::"Role", now() FROM tgt WHERE $2 = 'approved' ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET role = excluded.role RETURNING id), upd AS (UPDATE chat_identities ci SET status = $2, javis_user_id = COALESCE((SELECT id FROM usr), ci.javis_user_id) FROM tgt WHERE ci.id = tgt.id RETURNING ci.channel, ci.channel_user_id, ci.status) SELECT (SELECT channel FROM upd) AS target_chan, (SELECT channel_user_id FROM upd) AS target_uid, (SELECT status FROM upd) AS new_status, CASE WHEN $2 = 'approved' THEN $3 END AS granted_role

WITH cfg AS (SELECT value::int AS lim FROM system_config WHERE key='rate_limit_qa_per_hour'), up AS (INSERT INTO rate_limit_counters (id, javis_user_id, window_start, count) VALUES ('rl_'||substr(md5(random()::text||clock_timestamp()::text),1,20), $1, date_trunc('hour', now()), 1) ON CONFLICT (javis_user_id, window_start) DO UPDATE SET count = rate_limit_counters.count + 1 RETURNING count) SELECT (SELECT count FROM up) AS cnt, (SELECT lim FROM cfg) AS lim
SELECT cs.messages AS history FROM (VALUES ($1, $2)) v(cuid, chan) LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.channel = v.chan AND cs.channel_user_id = v.cuid AND cs.expires_at > now()

INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (id, channel, channel_user_id, messages, expires_at) VALUES ('cs_'||substr(md5(random()::text||clock_timestamp()::text),1,20), $4, $1, jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('role','user','content',$2::text), jsonb_build_object('role','assistant','content',$3::text)), now() + make_interval(mins => COALESCE((SELECT value::int FROM system_config WHERE key = 'session_ttl_minutes'), 30))) ON CONFLICT (channel, channel_user_id) DO UPDATE SET messages = (SELECT jsonb_agg(elem ORDER BY ord) FROM (SELECT elem, ord FROM jsonb_array_elements(conversation_sessions.messages || excluded.messages) WITH ORDINALITY t(elem, ord) ORDER BY ord DESC LIMIT 10) s), expires_at = excluded.expires_at RETURNING channel_user_id

INSERT INTO audit_logs (id, job_id, ts, stage, level, channel, javis_user_id, event, detail, cost_usd) VALUES ('al_'||substr(md5(random()::text||clock_timestamp()::text),1,20), $1, now(), 'qa-flow', 'info', $5, $2, 'qa_answered', $3::jsonb, $4) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO feedback_logs (id, job_id, javis_user_id, question, answer, rating, cited_docs, created_at) SELECT 'fb_'||substr(md5(random()::text||clock_timestamp()::text),1,20), $1, $2, COALESCE(al.detail->>'question',''), COALESCE(al.detail->>'answer',''), $3, COALESCE(al.detail->'citations','[]'::jsonb), now() FROM (VALUES (1)) v LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT detail FROM audit_logs WHERE job_id = $1 AND event = 'qa_answered' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) al ON true ON CONFLICT (job_id, javis_user_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = excluded.rating RETURNING rating

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 60, system: 'จำแนกข้อความผู้ใช้เป็น intent เดียว ตอบ JSON เท่านั้นเช่น {"intent":"qa"} โดย qa = คำถามหาข้อมูล/ขอความรู้จากคลังเอกสารของทีม, help = ถามวิธีใช้งานบอท/บอททำอะไรได้, smalltalk = ทักทาย ขอบคุณ คุยเล่นไม่ได้หาข้อมูล ถ้าไม่แน่ใจให้ตอบ qa', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: String($json.text || '').slice(0, 500) }] }) }}
